subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Fragrances of God! Verily I read thy excellent letter and was dilated through its excellent contents.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه بنفحات الله انی تلوت تحریرک الجدید و انشرحت بمضمونها اللطیف
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @growth of the Cause, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
